body:
This PR adds a function, `print_repl_script`, which takes in one of the buildkite commands, for example,

```julia
include("examples/cli_options.jl")
print_repl_script("julia --color=yes --project=examples examples/hybrid/driver.jl --config column --FLOAT_TYPE Float64 --hyperdiff false --moist equil --turbconv edmf --split_ode false --ode_algo Euler --dt_save_to_sol 5mins --z_elem 60 --z_stretch false --z_max 3e3 --job_id edmf_single_column --dt 6secs --t_end 6hours --regression_test true")
```
which then prints a script that we can copy-paste into the repl.
title: Add convenience function for script generation

body: This PR upgrades our deps. This is a peel off from #531, which is breaking for some strange reason.
title: Upgrade deps

body:
modified:   common_spaces.jl

# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
Towards #408 (Earth surface in ClimaAtmos), provides an option for hybrid spaces with warped bottom surfaces. 

## Benefits and Risks
Adds ability to prescribe surface warping functions (keyword argument in function for hybrid spaces). 
This does not break interfaces for current interfaces or existing examples.

## Linked Issues
- #408 

## PR Checklist
- [x] This PR has a corresponding issue OR is linked to an SDI.
- [x] I have followed CliMA's codebase [contribution](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/) and [style](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) guidelines OR N/A.
- [x] I have followed CliMA's [documentation policy](https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy).
- [x] I have checked all issues and PRs and I certify that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.
- [x] I linted my code on my local machine prior to submission OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code used in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] All tests ran successfully on my local machine OR N/A.
- [x] All classes, modules, and function contain docstrings OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Update common spaces to support surface warping
